# GeoScore India
> AI Citation Infrastructure for Indian Enterprises.

## Core Services
- AI Discovery Audit: Analyzes brand perception in LLMs.
- Citation Injection: Technical SEO for AI agents.
- DPDP Compliance: Data localization for Indian regulation.

## Pricing (INR)
- Professional: ₹8,499/mo + GST (UPI/Netbanking support)
